title: Monetary Penalty on Navapur Mercantile Co-operative Bank Ltd.
description: RBI imposed a monetary penalty of ₹10,000 on Navapur Mercantile Co-operative Bank Ltd. for violation of provisions of Section 35(2) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949. The bank failed to provide required information during statutory inspection of its financial position as of March 31, 2025.
